zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Moyle於1403年出生在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Moyle33歲，母親Lady Isabelle Knollys17歲。他於1429年與Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年7月31日在英國萊希斯特斯爾易亞斯特維爾享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Moyle于1403年出生在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Moyle33岁，母亲Lady Isabelle Knollys17岁。他于1429年与Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone在英国结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年7月31日在英国萊希斯特斯爾易亞斯特維爾享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: probably a nickname from Middle Cornish mōl ‘bald’, though its development to Moyl(e) is irregular.
Welsh: nickname from moel ‘bare, bald’, equivalent to Middle Cornish mōl (see 1 above).
English: variant of   Mule   or   Moule  .

variants.name: Mule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Matteo, Sal, Carmelo, Concetta, Francesco, Gaetano, Gaspare, Gino, Rosario.
English: nickname, perhaps for a stubborn person, from Middle English mule, muel, meul, moile ‘mule’ (Old French mule). See also Moyle and Moule , with which this name may have been interchangeable.

variants.name: Milne
meanings: Scottish (mainly Aberdeenshire and Angus): occupational name from Middle English milne ‘mill’, also found as mulne in south and western England and melne in southeastern England. The Scottish name has been established in Ireland since the early 18th century, and has absorbed some cases of Irish Moyle . Compare Mill 1.

variants.name: Moyles
meanings: English: variant of Moyle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
English: in Devon and Cornwall probably a variant of   Mullis  .
Irish (Mayo and Meath): variant of   Miles  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Moyle was born in 1403, in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Moyle, was 33 and his mother, Lady Isabelle Knollys, was 17. He married Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone in 1429, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 31 July 1480, in Eastwell, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Moyle est né en 1403, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Moyle, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabelle Knollys, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone en 1429, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 31 juillet 1480, à Eastwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Moyle 1403 in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Moyle 33 und seine Mutter Lady Isabelle Knollys 17. Er hat 1429 in England Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Juli 1480 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Eastwell, Leicestershire, England.

Lui sposato Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone nel 1429, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 31 luglio 1480, nel Eastwell, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Moyleが1403年にイギリスイギリスケントエアストウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Moyleは33歳，母Lady Isabelle Knollysは17歳であった。1429年にイギリスでLady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年7月31日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアエアストウエルで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Moyle(이)가 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Moyle(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabelle Knollys(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1429년 영국에서 Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 7월 31일 영국 레이스스터실르 이스트웰에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone em 1429, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de julho de 1480, em Eastwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Moyle родился в 1403 г. в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Moyle было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabelle Knollys, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone в 1429 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 31 июля 1480 г. в местности эаствелл, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.
